title: Lanostry's wolves
description: Will diversify your visual experience with wolves
body:
![wolf types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfcdf8064237ee9302dfed9acced6d515ef0dc00.png)
## **📜 Description**

This resourcepack adds over 16 variations of new wolves that can spawn randomly or depending on a certain biome, and to make it easier for you to collect them, each wolf skin has a name tag (the list of names can be found in the resourcepack file)

Also, these wolves are twice as large as vanilla wolves :р

Future plans include adding new sounds so that big cats don't bark like wolves

## **🌻 Recommendations**

I recommend using it together with the [Domestications innovations](https://modrinth.com/mod/domestication-innovation) and [Meowing](https://modrinth.com/mod/meowng) mods to improve interaction with wolves and make the game with this resourcepack even fresher. Try not to use this pack on older versions of minecraft, as they are not compatible with the features I added. Follow the game version number on the resource pack to avoid errors (resource pack for 1.20 will not work for version 1.21)

You can also give your wolf any name (and in any language), but to change the skin, you need to put the skin number next to the name (example and list of names in the resourcepack, works only for java version)

Use optifine or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [CEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) to run the resourcepack (if you use optifine replacements, there may be bugs that cannot be affected)

## **👺 Terms of use**

I forbid you to use my resourcepacks/mods for commercial purposes, to use them in third-party projects, paid modpacks, on public servers with paid pass or donation, as well as to distribute them on other sites
It is also forbidden to use textures from my projects for training neural networks
If you want to use my projects in your modpacks, you must credit me as the author and share a portion of the revenue from downloads
For other uses (videos, articles, etc.), please provide a link to the download (modrinth or curseforge)
All of this works with the full or modified package, as well as if you use only part of the content

## **🦉 Community**

[![Lanostry's discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e5697386e285f1afe56ca77abec85d2983d802.png)](https://discord.gg/mThvczzpuV)
